zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike於大約1423年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德時，她的父親William Copledike of Harington22歲，母親Elinore Hawley22歲。她於大約1442年與Godfrey Coney在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。她去世於1450年享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike于大约1423年出生在英国英格兰波藍德时，她的父亲William Copledike of Harington22岁，母亲Elinore Hawley22岁。她于大约1442年与Godfrey Coney在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。她去世于1450年享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Harrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, a local name from any of several places in England so named. The one in Gloucestershire is an Old English compound meaning ‘settlement of Beorn's people’. In the Somerset place name the first element is an unattested Old English personal name Bāra, which also occurs, in the genitive form, as the first element of the Cambridgeshire place name. Barrington has also been used as an English form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin.

nameMeanings.name: Cumberland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Cumberland in northwestern England (now part of Cumbria). In Britain this name is most common in Nottinghamshire.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike was born about 1423, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Copledike of Harington, was 22 and her mother, Elinore Hawley, was 22. She married Godfrey Coney about 1442, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. She died in 1450, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike est née environ 1423, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Copledike of Harington, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elinore Hawley, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Godfrey Coney environ 1442, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Elle est décédée en 1450, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike um 1423 in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Copledike of Harington 22 und ihre Mutter Elinore Hawley 22. Sie hat um 1442 in Lincolnshire, England Godfrey Coney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 28 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike è nata il circa 1423 nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Copledike of Harington, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Elinore Hawley, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Godfrey Coney circa 1442, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Morì nel 1450, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledikeが約1423年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父William Copledike of Haringtonは22歳，母Elinore Hawleyは22歳であった。約1442年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでGodfrey Coneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子の親であった。彼女は1450年に28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Copledike of Harington(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elinore Hawley(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1442년 영국 링코실르에서 Godfrey Coney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Copledike of Harington, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elinore Hawley, tinha 22 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike родилась около 1423 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Copledike of Harington было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elinore Hawley, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfrey Coney около 1442 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. Она умерла в 1450 г. в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike nació aproximadamente 1423, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Copledike of Harington, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elinore Hawley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Godfrey Coney aproximadamente 1442, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos. Murió en 1450, a la edad de 28 años.
